column3: Looking after people's pet can earn you some extra cash.
You could always fill in for someone while they're on holiday.
Working at an amusement park is as fun as it sounds.
Shops popular with tourists always need extra hands in the summer.
If you've got training, you could work at a pool.
Tending gardens can be a good way to earn money in the summer.
Summer camps are a great place to work and have fun.
